contextual.title: Efficacy of Intensity Modulated Radiation Therapy After Surgery in Early Stage of Esophageal Carcinoma;

metadata.brief_title: Efficacy of Intensity Modulated Radiation Therapy After Surgery in Early Stage of Esophageal Carcinoma;
metadata.diseases: ['Esophageal Neoplasm', 'Esophageal Cancer TNM Staging Primary Tumor (T) T2', 'Esophageal Cancer TNM Staging Primary Tumor (T) T3', 'Esophageal Cancer TNM Staging Regional Lymph Nodes (N) N0', 'Esophageal Cancer TNM Staging Distal Metastasis (M) M0']
diseases_list: Esophageal Cancer TNM Staging Primary Tumor (T) T2
Esophageal Cancer TNM Staging Primary Tumor (T) T3
Esophageal Cancer TNM Staging Regional Lymph Nodes (N) N0
Esophageal Cancer TNM Staging Distal Metastasis (M) M0
metadata.brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to determine the efficacy of preventive intensity modulated radiation therapy after surgery in stage T2-3N0M0 disease of thoracic esophageal squamous cell carcinoma(UICC 7th edition) and to identify the subgroup benefiting from the treatment.
